_publications._publicationTitle: Icariin Promotes Osteogenic Differentiation in a Cell Model with NF1 Gene Knockout by Activating the cAMP/PKA/CREB Pathway.

_contextSnippet: the mRNA expression levels of ALP, Runx2, Osx and Col1a1 in the 2−7 group were significantly lower than those in the control group at different time points of osteogenic differentiation
details: NF1 gene knockout in C2C12 cells resulted in significantly reduced osteogenic differentiation with decreased mRNA expression of ALP, Runx2, Osx and Col1a1 at all time points
